since_last: 61% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.24%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.40% · BTC -1.63% · Gold +0.51% · Nasdaq100 +0.99%. 61% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.24%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.24%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.62%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +22.95%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +22.95%, AMBA +7.40%, SYNA +5.65%, KLAC +5.57%, LRCX +5.27%. Laggards: DLR -5.37%, TTD -4.94%, EQIX -3.91%, HON -2.59%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.49% at $165.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.49% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
